rationale: Core implementation matched the transaction-boundary design, but verification did not directly prove all named save paths used the shared boundary and the slice carried an undocumented abh next behavior change.

findings.finding: Verification does not directly cover every core save path named by the exit criteria
findings.evidence: Focused helper-usage assertion was only for plans while audit, memory, drift, and attractor wiring was only visible in code.
findings.recommendation: Add targeted tests for audit, memory, drift, and attractor saves or equivalent integration tests asserting those paths call write_json_markdown_pair().

findings.finding: Plan scope includes an undocumented abh next behavior change
findings.evidence: Plan goals covered repository write-boundary work, but task-board and code included blocked/deferred abh next behavior.
findings.recommendation: Move the navigation change into its own plan or update the plan goals and closure evidence so the documented scope matches the shipped scope.
